description: Vendor status pages, TLS cert inspection, DNS propagation checks, and incident-response playbooks.
name: io.github.cyanheads/devops-status-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: When 'true', disables SSRF guards for user-supplied URLs and domains. For trusted local/intranet deployments only. Leave unset or 'false' for hosted/public deployments.
environmentVariables.name: DEVOPS_STATUS_ALLOW_PRIVATE_TARGETS

environmentVariables.description: When 'true', omits the arbitrary-target probe tools (devops_check_dns, devops_check_certs) from the registered tool surface; the five vendor-registry/incident tools remain. For shared/public multi-tenant instances. Leave unset or 'false' to register both tools.
environmentVariables.name: DEVOPS_STATUS_DISABLE_ACTIVE_PROBES
